# SOFTWARE SERVICES AGREEMENT

**Parties:** Acme Corp ("Client") and GoodVendor Inc ("Vendor")
**Date:** January 1, 2025
**Contract Value:** $120,000 annually

## 1. Services

Vendor agrees to provide cloud-based analytics and reporting services
to Client, including dashboard access, data visualization, and
scheduled reporting capabilities.

## 2. Term and Termination

This agreement shall commence on the date first written above and
continue for an initial term of one year, with automatic renewal.
Either party may terminate this agreement with 90 days written
notice to the other party prior to the end of any term.

## 3. Liability

Vendor's total cumulative liability under this agreement shall not
exceed two times (2x) the total annual contract value ($240,000)
in any twelve-month period, regardless of the cause of action.

## 4. Payment

Client shall pay all undisputed invoices within 30 days of receipt
(Net-30). Late payments shall incur a 1.5% monthly interest charge
after the grace period.

## 5. Dispute Resolution

Any disputes arising under this agreement shall first be submitted
to binding arbitration under the rules of the American Arbitration
Association (AAA) before any litigation may be initiated. The
arbitration shall take place in New York, NY.

## 6. Data Privacy

Vendor shall process all Client data in strict accordance with the
General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the California Consumer
Privacy Act (CCPA). A Data Processing Agreement (DPA) is attached
as Exhibit A and forms part of this agreement.

## 7. Confidentiality

Both parties agree to maintain the confidentiality of proprietary
information shared during the course of this agreement for a period
of three years following termination.
